notes: Anonymous *D dim block: DIM lines, ArchTicks, MTEXT 80, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Name *D335 plus exclusively DIM/DEFPOINTS layers, two _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT '\A1;80', and extension/dimension LINEs form a classic AutoCAD dimension anonymous block. No WALL/A-WALL geometry or closed plan outlines appear.
rationale.rule: Blocks named *D# with DIM-layer ticks, numeric MTEXT, and DEFPOINTS points are dimension caches, not plan geometry.
rationale.counterfactual: If WALL-layer parallel polylines without ArchTick/DIM MTEXT were present, role could shift toward 평면 부분도 and wall_likelihood would rise.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot see the parent dimension style or measured object from this projection alone; only the exploded dim graphics are visible.

notes: Horizontal dim cache: ArchTicks, MTEXT 2500, DIM/DEFPOINTS only.

rationale.evidence: *D336 contains two vertical extension LINEs, one long horizontal dim LINE, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 2500, and three DEFPOINTS on DIM/DEFPOINTS layers only.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D definitions whose entities are solely dimension primitives on DIM/DEFPOINTS are 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Furniture-like closed outlines on a FURN layer with no dim ticks would flip role away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Span 2500 matches the line spacing roughly, but host wall/opening identity is outside this block projection.

notes: Short dim *D337 with ArchTicks and MTEXT 135.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs (extensions, ticks arms, dim line), two _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT 135, and DEFPOINTS points match a compact linear dimension block.
rationale.rule: Presence of _ArchTick plus numeric DIM MTEXT on *D* blocks indicates dimension cache geometry.
rationale.counterfactual: Absence of ticks/MTEXT and presence of thick double-line wall pairs would reclassify toward plan walls.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 135 annotates a wall thickness or a gap cannot be decided without the referenced model entities.

notes: Dim cache *D338: ArchTicks, MTEXT 320, DIM lines only.

rationale.evidence: Entity mix is LINE+INSERT(_ArchTick)+MTEXT(320)+POINT(DEFPOINTS) all on DIM/DEFPOINTS; bbox is a thin annotation strip, not a room outline.
rationale.rule: Treat *D anonymous blocks with ArchTick and DEFPOINTS as 치수캐시 regardless of numeric value.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block also contained A-WALL polylines forming a closed corridor, role could become mixed/평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Projection lacks leader association and parent dim object handle, so measured feature type remains unknown.

notes: Long span dim *D339 with MTEXT 6060 and ArchTicks.

rationale.evidence: Wide horizontal DIM line between two extension lines, _ArchTick pair, MTEXT 6060, and DEFPOINTS points; layers are only DIM and DEFPOINTS.
rationale.rule: Long dimension strings still count as 치수캐시 when composed of dim primitives on DIM/DEFPOINTS in a *D* block.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs were on WALL and formed continuous plan edges without ticks/text, wall_likelihood would be high.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot confirm units or whether 6060 is overall building width versus a room span from this block alone.

notes: Narrow dim *D340: ArchTicks, MTEXT 150.

rationale.evidence: Two short vertical extensions, one horizontal dim LINE, MTEXT 150, two _ArchTick inserts, three DEFPOINTS — standard dimension anonymous block pattern.
rationale.rule: DIM-layer geometry plus ArchTick and DEFPOINTS in *D* definitions maps to role 치수캐시 with wall_likelihood near zero.
rationale.counterfactual: Symbol blocks (north arrow, section mark) would show distinct symbol graphics without numeric dim MTEXT and DEFPOINTS triad.
rationale.uncertainty: 150 could be thickness or clearance; host geometry is not in the projection.

notes: Adjacent dim cache *D341 with MTEXT 150.

rationale.evidence: Same structure as neighboring dims: DIM LINEs, _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT 150, DEFPOINTS points; no construction layers.
rationale.rule: Repeated *D* siblings that only differ by coordinate/value remain 치수캐시 independently.
rationale.counterfactual: Adding furniture rectangles or door swing arcs would push role toward 가구/심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Spatial adjacency to *D340 suggests a chain of dims, but chaining is inferred, not proven here.

notes: Dim *D342 with ArchTicks and MTEXT 1700.

rationale.evidence: Three DIM LINEs spanning ~1700, ArchTick pair, MTEXT 1700, DEFPOINTS — classic linear dimension cache contents.
rationale.rule: When MTEXT numeric value aligns with extension-line spacing and ticks are present, classify as 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Missing MTEXT/ticks and presence of hatch/wall polylines would flip away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Orientation relative to the floor plan and what is being measured are outside this definition.

notes: Short dim *D343: ArchTicks, MTEXT 130.

rationale.evidence: Entities confined to DIM/DEFPOINTS with _ArchTick and MTEXT 130; LINEs are extension/dim segments only.
rationale.rule: Do not treat DIM-layer extension lines as walls; wall_line_handles stay empty for pure dim caches.
rationale.counterfactual: If handles on a WALL layer formed parallel pairs at typical wall thickness without dim ticks, those would be wall candidates.
rationale.uncertainty: Block could be associative or exploded remnant; associativity cannot be read from the sample.

notes: Dim cache *D344 with MTEXT 130 and ArchTicks.

rationale.evidence: Identical dim-cache signature: two extensions, one dim line, ArchTicks, MTEXT 130, DEFPOINTS on DIM layers.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D naming plus ArchTick/DEFPOINTS is sufficient to assign 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: A title-block or logo block would include TEXT styles and non-DIM layers without DEFPOINTS dim points.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot tell if 130 is mm wall leaf thickness without the referenced wall entities.

notes: Dim *D345: ArchTicks, MTEXT 1500, DIM/DEFPOINTS only.

rationale.evidence: Horizontal dimension assembly with MTEXT 1500, _ArchTick inserts, and DEFPOINTS; no plan or furniture entities sampled.
rationale.rule: Dimension anonymous blocks are annotation caches; wall_likelihood remains 0 unless wall-layer structure appears.
rationale.counterfactual: If INSERT targets were door/window symbols instead of ArchTick, role might become 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether this dims a room interior or exterior face is unknowable from the block alone.

notes: Dim *D346 with five DIM lines, ArchTicks, MTEXT 210.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs including short tick arms, two _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT 210, and DEFPOINTS triad — full linear dimension graphic set.
rationale.rule: Extra short LINEs at tick ends still count as dimension geometry, not wall segments.
rationale.counterfactual: Closed rectangular loops on WALL with door openings would indicate 평면 부분도 instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Exact dim style (architectural ticks vs arrows) is partly visible via ArchTick but parent style name is absent.

notes: Vertical-ish dim *D347 using DIMDOT ticks and MTEXT 1735.

rationale.evidence: Two horizontal extension LINEs, one vertical dim LINE, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 1735, DEFPOINTS — still pure dimension cache, tick flavor DIMDOT not ArchTick.
rationale.rule: DIMDOT or _ArchTick both mark dimension terminators; either supports 치수캐시 classification.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacement of dim lines with stair/furniture outlines would change role to 가구 or 기타.
rationale.uncertainty: Bbox height/width suggest a vertical measurement, but world orientation relative to plan north is unknown.

notes: Compact dim *D348: ArchTicks, MTEXT 375.

rationale.evidence: Small bbox with DIM LINEs, _ArchTick pair, MTEXT 375, DEFPOINTS; layers exclusively DIM/DEFPOINTS.
rationale.rule: Compact *D* blocks with numeric MTEXT and ticks are still 치수캐시, never walls by default.
rationale.counterfactual: If MTEXT were a room name and entities were on A-ANNO without ticks, role could be 기타/심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: 375 may label a niche or wall build-up; host solids/walls are not projected.

notes: Wide horizontal dim *D349 with DIMDOT and MTEXT 5470.

rationale.evidence: Two vertical extensions, long horizontal dim LINE, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 5470, DEFPOINTS — long-run dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Wide annotation strips of DIM primitives in *D* definitions are 치수캐시; do not list extension lines as walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Parallel WALL-layer lines spanning the same distance without DIMDOT/MTEXT would be wall candidates.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot verify the 5470 value against true measured geometry without the model space hosts.

notes: Dim *D350: DIMDOT terminators, MTEXT 1645.

rationale.evidence: Standard three-LINE dim skeleton with DIMDOT INSERTs, MTEXT 1645, and DEFPOINTS on DIM/DEFPOINTS only.
rationale.rule: DIMDOT-terminated *D* blocks follow the same 치수캐시 rule as ArchTick ones.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of INSERT blocks named for toilets/desks would flip toward 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Chain continuity with *D349/*D351 is suggested by shared x-coords but not proven inside this definition.

notes: Dim *D351 with DIMDOT and MTEXT 1165.

rationale.evidence: DIM-layer extensions and dim line, DIMDOT pair, MTEXT 1165, DEFPOINTS points; no non-annotation layers.
rationale.rule: Independent judgment still yields 치수캐시 whenever entity set is dimension-only in a *D* block.
rationale.counterfactual: If DEFPOINTS/DIM vanished and only centerline symbols remained, role might become 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Measurement purpose (opening, bay, clear width) cannot be recovered from the projection alone.

notes: Side dim *D352: horizontal extensions, DIMDOT, MTEXT 630.

rationale.evidence: Two horizontal LINEs and one vertical dim LINE with DIMDOT inserts and MTEXT 630, plus DEFPOINTS — vertical dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Dimension orientation (horizontal or vertical) does not change 치수캐시 role when ticks and DIM MTEXT dominate.
rationale.counterfactual: A section-callout bubble with letters and no numeric dim line would be 심볼 instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Which story height or element 630 refers to is unknown without the host drawing context.

notes: Tall vertical dim *D353: DIMDOT, MTEXT 2640.

rationale.evidence: Tall bbox with paired horizontal extensions, vertical dim LINE, DIMDOT terminators, MTEXT 2640, DEFPOINTS — annotation-only.
rationale.rule: Tall *D* dimension strips remain 치수캐시; wall_likelihood stays 0 without wall-layer structure.
rationale.counterfactual: If the vertical LINE were a WALL centerline flanked by offset wall faces, wall_likelihood would increase.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 2640 is floor-to-floor or a stacked room height cannot be determined here.

notes: Tall dim *D354: DIMDOT, MTEXT 3905, DIM/DEFPOINTS only.

rationale.evidence: Same vertical-dimension pattern as neighbors: horizontal extensions, vertical dim LINE, DIMDOT INSERTs, MTEXT 3905, DEFPOINTS on DIM layers only.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D# blocks composed of dim lines, terminator inserts, numeric MTEXT, and DEFPOINTS classify as 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Adding plan wall polylines or furniture inserts would force reconsideration toward 평면 부분도 or 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Relationship to *D352/*D353 as a stacked dimension string is plausible from coordinates but not confirmed inside this block.
